reviews.review_description: basically the graphics looks good, i personally think this game should be called a map preview rather than a open beta since there is nothing to do except for looking at the stunning visuals, there was a bug where the pile of rocks next to that picnic table had no collisions but thats all i could find, also that really weird glow on the arms looks really weird and i dont really like it that much. Overall, dont expect a actual game YET, the game is still in the works and they only released this since people were begging (thats what other reviews say anyway) and that its a small snippet of the game's spawn area to showcase the graphics of the real game once it releases

The game looks extremely good, it has good graphics and it runs well on quest 2.
The game is in the Open Beta stage so there's a small map where you can go check out how the game would look.
Music is cool and the vibe ingame feels pretty good.


dont be disappointed by the map, its open beta meaning the full game is not out its just a little piece of it for players to experience how its gonna be.

developer_response.body:
Hey, thank you for explaining that the game is in open beta and you can only access the demo scene/spawn area. Thank you for checking out the game it means a lot especially when I know who you are!
Thank you!

reviews.review_description: For an open beta, the graphics and sfx are out of this world. They are undoubtedly better than 90% of games, and this game definitely has potential. While you can not play anything in it yet, once the game fully releases, it will be phenomenal.
I love the graphics OG the game and I also I love the how the terrain in the game is with a bunch of tree and other thing. I can not wait till the fully game comes out great job truffle and wicket.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review! We appreciate your opinion on the demo and graphics so much and are excited for you to check out the full release especially with the graphics remake update coming later today!

reviews.review_description: I didn't know it was an open beta my bad

developer_response.body: Hey! Were sorry you are unable to play the game currently, this is because the game is in open beta due to high demand of a release. The area you are currently playing is the demo scene also known as the spawn area for the full release! Please be sure to check out the discord for more information on this matter! We appreciate your support and hope this explains and you can remove your review!

reviews.review_title: I can rate ts game however i want bud
reviews.review_description: Game is lowkey trash. No point of releasing it when you have no gameplay
The game although (as of writing) has no gameplay, it has some of the most beautiful graphics I have seen throughout many VR games.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review! If you like the graphics already be sure to check out the new update coming soon with a whole graphics remake! Thanks for telling us about your experience!

reviews.review_description: It looks amazing good job but little thing would be good if the body Hitbox was a bit smaller as it's hard to move around

developer_response.body: Thanks for you review! In the new update coming out today we will be revamping the graphics and have fixed you issue!

reviews.review_title: This game will be better in the future
reviews.review_description:
The game is unfinished so dont give it an one star review
It will be better in the future

developer_response.body: Thanks for you review! The game is planned to have so much more content coming soon!

reviews.review_description: There’s a lot of potential for this game to be BIG. Keep it up man and don’t let us down!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your support and review! The game is planned to be so much bigger throughout the next few updates.
